\tzpentry{ID3874}{Kaluza-Klein Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3874 introduces Kaluza-Klein Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_{\text{total}}[t] = \int_{\mathcal{V}} \mathbf{A} \cdot \mathbf{B} \, d^3x - \frac{\boldsymbol{\omega}_{\text{gyro}}}{c^2} \int_{\mathcal{V}} \mathbf{r} \times (\mathbf{E} \times \mathbf{B}) \, d^3x + \sum_{m=1}^{\infty} \frac{m}{R_{KK}} \mathcal{H}_m^{KK} \end{equation}
